testcase.name: testAddNewProduct
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-02 10:15:42.337 [main] INFO org.testng.internal.Utils - [XmlSuite] [WARN] 'parallel' value 'false' is no longer valid, defaulting to 'none'. 2026-06-02 10:15:43.363 [main] INFO listeners.TestExecutionListener - Starting test suite: Online Store API Suite { "id": 21, "title": "Incredible Iron Shoes", "price": 46.82, "description": "Quo sit et sed.", "image": "https://i.pravatar.cc/100", "category": "clothing" } 21

testUpdateProduct
